description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.53.0

The public calendar and app name have been updated.

• 🏷 App name changed to "Machi Tekori" — Renamed from "My Oshi Machi" (the "Myはんのう" name for Hanno remains the same)
• 📅 "Choose Calendar" page redesigned — Shows a list of calendars you're subscribed to. Search by municipality or category, and each calendar now has tags showing its municipality and category
• 🗺 Browse calendars from municipalities across Japan — Search by prefecture using the 50-sound order, then by city/ward. Municipalities with registered calendars are highlighted with a count, and those without are shown in gray
• 📅 Subscribe/unsubscribe now marked with calendar icon — Use 📅 to subscribe or unsubscribe. When you tap it, the change doesn't disappear right away—you can confirm before it switches
• 🔗 Go to a calendar provider's page from the calendar — Tap a calendar name in the list to visit that municipality or community's page
• 🖼 SNS share banner refreshed — Updated the preview image that appears when you share a link
• 📇 Shop card L-size portrait layout revised — Simplified to the same clean vertical layout as business cards
• 📱 Store QR codes set to "auto-recommend" by default — When someone scans a store's QR code, they automatically "recommend" that store—this setting is now on by default
